```python
def main():
    import sys
    S = sys.stdin.readline().strip()
    n = len(S)
    if n == 0:
        print("")
        return
    
    # Create the concatenated string for KMP LPS
    T = S + '#' + S[::-1]
    lps = [0] * len(T)
    
    for i in range(1, len(T)):
        j = lps[i-1]
        while j > 0 and T[i] != T[j]:
            j = lps[j-1]
        if T[i] == T[j]:
            j += 1
        lps[i] = j
    
    lps_len = lps[-1]
    # The part of S that is not part of the palindrome needs to be mirrored
    result = S[:n - lps_len][::-1] + S
    print(result)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
```
